title: Desmos tiebaghiensis
taxonomy: Desmos tiebaghiensis is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Desmosaceae. It is a member of the genus Desmos, which comprises several species of climbing plants native to Southeast Asia. Desmos tiebaghiensis is specifically found in Indonesia and is one of the many species within the genus Desmos that are commonly used in traditional medicine. The plant is a type of yam, and its classification is further supported by its morphological characteristics and genetic analysis. Desmos tiebaghiensis is closely related to other species within the Desmos genus, such as Desmos cochinchinensis and Desmos pulchellus.
benefits: Desmos tiebaghiensis is a species of flowering plant, but there is limited information available regarding its health benefits.
